name: forensic-lab-validate-portal
description: Playwright-based Azure Portal screenshots for forensic storage lab validation

scripts.pretest: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=if($env:EDGE_PROFILE){$env:EDGE_PROFILE}else{'Profile 4'};$s=\"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\$p\";$d='%TEMP%\pw-edge-profile-copy';if(Test-Path $d){Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force};New-Item $d -ItemType Directory -Force|Out-Null;@('Network','Local Storage','Session Storage','IndexedDB','databases')|ForEach-Object{if(Test-Path $s\$_){robocopy $s\$_ $d\$_ /MIR /R:0 /W:0 /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS /NP 2>$null|Out-Null}};@('Preferences','Secure Preferences','Login Data','Web Data')|ForEach-Object{if(Test-Path $s\$_){Copy-Item $s\$_ $d\$_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}}"
